stemHtml:
Given the following planning data, calculate the maximum possible extra fuel in kg, including any fuel penalty that can be uplifted:

Maximum Ramp Mass: 77 500kg 
Maximum Take Off Mass: 77 000kg 
Maximum Landing Mass: 66 360kg 
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 62 720kg 
Dry Operating Mass: 42 845kg 
Traffic Load: 17 460kg 
Planned Take Off Fuel: 10 365kg 
Trip Fuel: 7890kg 
Taxi Fuel: 195kg 
Fuel Penalty: 135kg/1000kg of extra fuel 
Max Fuel Tank Capacity: 14 000kg
